steps.title: Track the scientific shift
steps.content: The Wigner crystal was proposed in 1934 but remained largely conjecture. In 2021, Chen and colleagues captured an image, described as the first visual confirmation of the crystal.

steps.title: Focus on confirmation
steps.content: B focuses on the method rather than the evidence. C overstates graphene's importance, and D invents a reason imaging is difficult. The answer is A.
